# fly_org (Resource)

Manages a Fly.io organization. Import using the organization slug.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "fly_org" "example" {
  name = "My Organization"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the organization. Changing this forces a new resource.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the organization.
- `slug` (String) The slug of the organization.
